case_title: SCOTT NELSON VS. MICHAEL JOSEPH ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CSC - LAWYERS INC. SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NELSON, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN COMPANY

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NELSON, SCOTT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED OCT-16-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, MICHAEL
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT WALGREEN COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9.50 FILED BY NELSON, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, MICHAEL WALGREEN COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - STAMPED SERVED OCT-21-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2015 - ALL ARE PRESENT IN OPEN COURT, HEARING HELD, JUDGMENT RENDERED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. (THIS MATTER IS ADVANCED FROM 12-03-15 AND HEARD WITH CASE #850727 AT REQUEST BY THE PARTIES) JPT. JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, PER STIPULATION BY PARTIES, ADVANCED FROM DEC-03-2015 TO SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR ON NOV-24-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. TO BE HEARD WITH CASE #850727.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF NELSON, SCOTT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NELSON, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALGREEN COMPANY $9.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9.50, CO-DEFENDANT MICHAEL JOSEPH IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
